name: Meow Ears Up!
original_name: น้องเหมียว ในห้องผม
overview: Dermdem's quiet life takes an unexpected turn when he rescues Meow, a stray cat with human-like traits. Their interactions bring turmoil, surprises, and new experiences to his once predictable days.

trailers.title: Official Trailer｜“Meow Ears Up น้องเหมียว ในห้องผม” on air 12 April 2022｜泰剧好久不见啊喵
